title: Prometheus TSDB WAL Corruption or Repair Log Events
dataSources: Prometheus server stderr (`prometheus:log`) and TSDB status snapshots
app: Kubernetes pod logs or systemd journal → Universal Forwarder
spl:
index=prometheus (sourcetype="prometheus:log" OR sourcetype="prometheus:tsdb")
| search "WAL" AND ("corrupt" OR "repair" OR "truncat")
| stats count, latest(_time) as last_seen by host, message
| sort -count
description: WAL issues risk data loss and long restarts after crashes.
value: Flags TSDB integrity problems requiring immediate storage investigation.
implementation: Enable debug logging only briefly; ship to isolated index with retention controls.
